glossary: In this universe: a 'Spark' is a tiny ancient alien machine creature (15-43cm tall, six-limbed, ceramic-metal composite shell with geometric engravings, bioluminescent panels, unique personality, NOT fire/flame/electricity). 'Progenitors' are the extinct alien civilization that built them 40000 years ago. 'Embers' are human deep-space explorers/archaeologists in worn exosuits and salvage gear. 'Crucibles' are Progenitor combat arenas with shifting terrain. 'Lumens' are alien crystal instruments (90cm, ceramic-metal, geometric engravings) that feed Sparks via photonic resonance. 'Singers' are humans gifted at playing Lumens. Aesthetic: utilitarian sci-fi meets ancient alien archaeology, NOT fantasy/medieval. Characters wear practical functional gear, NOT revealing clothing.
